pages.title: Elitez Merchandising — Singapore's FMCG In-Store Merchandiser-Promoter Agency

og.title: Singapore's largest FMCG merchandising bench
og.description: 350+ in-store FMCG manpower island-wide. EMR-Intel field-force platform. Tier-1 beauty, FMCG, F&B brands. Backed by Elitez Group.

pages.title: Services — Dedicated, Shared, Trade-Marketing, Audit | Elitez Merchandising

og.title: Five FMCG merchandising service lines
og.description: Dedicated teams, shared bench, trade-marketing execution, merchandising audit, and the EMR-Intel field-force platform under one roof.

pages.title: EMR-Intel — Proprietary Field-Force Management Platform | Elitez Merchandising

og.title: EMR-Intel — field-force SaaS bundled with every contract
og.description: Mobile app (EN/CN/BM), QuickView back-office, BI dashboards. MSL, share-of-shelf, OOS, planogram, promo compliance — live to brand HQ.

pages.title: Brands & Industries We Merchandise | Elitez Merchandising

og.title: Tier-1 brand roster — beauty, FMCG, F&B, pharma
og.description: L'Oréal (CPD, LUXE, PPD, ACD), Unilever, Shiseido, Pernod Ricard, Reckitt, FairPrice, Oatside, Suntory, Coty, Walch, Gardenia and more.

pages.title: About — Backed by Elitez Group of Companies | Elitez Merchandising

og.title: 15 years. 9 offices. WSG Human Capital Partner.
og.description: Elitez Merchandising is the FMCG arm of Elitez Group — government-aligned, ISO 9001 / 27001 certified, IHRP exclusive recruitment partner.

pages.title: Contact Jack Wang — Book a 15-min Discovery Call | Elitez Merchandising

og.title: Speak to Jack Wang, Associate Director
og.description: 15-min discovery call for FMCG brand and trade-marketing leads. Or download the merchandising deck. Singapore island-wide coverage.

og.title: Page not found
og.description: The page you were looking for is no longer here. Return to Elitez Merchandising home or contact Jack Wang.

og.description: Transient palette comparison page owned by Agent 2. Removed once a variant is chosen.

footer_attribution.text: Operated by Elitez Group of Companies

geo.audience_note: Singapore island-wide FMCG brand managers, trade-marketing leads, key-account managers, country directors

topics: Difference between Dedicated and Shared models
Pricing / engagement model (no published prices — 'engagement-based, headcount + tech stack')
Retention rate and how Elitez beats merchandiser attrition
How EMR-Intel integrates with brand HQ systems (Power BI / data exports)
Compliance posture — PDPA, MOM, ISO 9001, ISO 27001, Cyber Essentials
Geographic coverage — Singapore only for v1; group-level SEA presence is brand context

downstream_notes.agent_2: colors.html listed with internal:true; do not link from public nav.
downstream_notes.agent_4: Section ids in pages[].sections[] are LOCKED. Bind <section id> to them top-to-bottom. downstream_notes.agent_5: Write copy under copy.json.pages.<page_id>.sections.<section_id>. Do not invent new section ids. Honour the brief.constraints[] — no specific client headcounts; abstract to '350+ FMCG manpower island-wide' and '5–60 pax per dedicated client' style ranges.
downstream_notes.agent_6: OG image /og-image.jpg is the site default. Per-page OG variants not required for v1. Skip colors.html for sitemap.xml and per-page OG. 404.html should also be excluded from sitemap.xml but kept canonical.
downstream_notes.agent_7: QA gate excludes colors.html (internal). 404.html participates in semantic_audit but is exempt from sitemap.xml inclusion check.
